title: Chelsea Chief Under Abramovich Could Face Scrutiny Over Soccer Cheating
summary_full: A former key aide to the Russian oligarch would face an investigation into her time overseeing the Premier League club should she return to soccer.
summary_public: A former key aide to the Russian oligarch would face an investigation into her time overseeing the Premier League club should she return to soccer.

RU.label: neutral
RU.evidence: Russian oligarch would face an investigation
